preamble: The palatalization of the voiced alveolar lateral approximant [l] to [lʲ]. This is a common process in languages with a robust secondary articulation contrast.

examples.note: The 'soft L' contrast in Russian phonology.

sources: Hickey, R. (2011). The Dialects of Irish.
Jones, D., & Ward, D. (1969). The Phonetics of Russian.
